calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Nov-26-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Alexander Lubarsky, Esq. 415-370-7893 of Community Legal Centers for Defendant Leonor Rivera who is also present.
No other Appearance.

RULING - A R G U E D. Defendant's Counsel indicates opposing side is submitting on the papers and wil not appear. The Court informs parties the issue with earnings "unstable". The court suggests for party to file correctly. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION OF LEONOR G. RIVERA.

Denied without Prejudice.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)

Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Sep-08-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Judgment Debtor Leonor G. Rivera's Claim Of Exemption is granted. The Court shall sign and mail out a formal order to parties and Sheriff's Office. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)
